VIOLATION_DESENSITIZED: {name} is becoming numb to these kinds of actions.
VIOLATION_PTG_CREATIVE: {name} has begun channeling their pain into creative work.
VIOLATION_PTG_CURIOUS: {name}'s suffering has led them to ask deeper questions.

MENTAL_BREAK_TYPE_PANIC_DESC: A short-lived terror episode in which the individual flees toward the nearest safe spot. Resolves quickly but may leave a hypervigilance scar.
MENTAL_BREAK_TYPE_RAGE_DESC: An explosive burst of uncontrolled anger causing the individual to attack objects or others nearby. Highly energy-draining and may scar with anger dysregulation.
MENTAL_BREAK_TYPE_OUTRAGE_VIOLENCE_DESC: An extreme violent episode in which the individual seeks out negatively-regarded targets with lethal intent, potentially using weapons. The most dangerous mental break type.
MENTAL_BREAK_TYPE_SHUTDOWN_DESC: A dissociative freeze state in which the individual becomes emotionally numb and immobile. Long-lasting but provides significant stress catharsis.
MENTAL_BREAK_TYPE_PURGE_DESC: A compulsive binge-eating or resource-wasting episode directed at the nearest food storage. Low conscientiousness amplifies the likelihood.
MENTAL_BREAK_TYPE_GRIEF_WITHDRAWAL_DESC: A prolonged grief episode in which the individual retreats home and rejects all social contact. High emotionality prolongs the episode; may scar with complicated grief.
MENTAL_BREAK_TYPE_FUGUE_DESC: A dissociative wandering episode in which the individual leaves the settlement and drifts in a random direction. Longest potential duration; high openness increases susceptibility.
MENTAL_BREAK_TYPE_PARANOIA_DESC: A chronic paranoid state of intense distrust toward all others, leading to social isolation. Jobs are not abandoned but relationship trust collapses; high chronic paranoia scar risk.
MENTAL_BREAK_TYPE_COMPULSIVE_RITUAL_DESC: A brief compulsive episode in which the individual repetitively performs an action at their current location. High conscientiousness paradoxically amplifies risk; ritual provides stress relief.
MENTAL_BREAK_TYPE_HYSTERICAL_BONDING_DES: An anxious clinging episode in which the individual latches onto their closest positive relationship and refuses to separate. High sociability and dependence traits amplify risk.
CONTAGION_EVENT_RAGE_SPREAD: Rage is spreading to nearby agents
